race.comment: LOCHEND PRINCESS (12) is a four-start maiden who finished second over 1208m at Sale last time out. She's off a let-up here which is the little niggle but is coming along well and looks a strong hope at each-way odds. ALPHABET (7) finished ninth two runs back then improved last start but found a couple better over 1200m at Ballarat Synthetic, beaten 2.5 lengths. Can improve again and has claims. FOXTROT CHARLIE (2) resumes from a spell of six months having placed on debut at Mornington before struggling at Pakenham. He's won a jumpout and should go well fresh. EARTHING (17) is back after a break of five months having last been seen finishing down the track in the G3 CS Hayes Stakes at Flemington. This is much easier and he's bred to improve this time around.
